summary_text: **Findings (risk-ordered)** 1. `Medium` Default behavior changed from fixed `codex` to provider-derived assistant in run-complete/milestone paths. [`scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L10`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L10), [`scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh#L19`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh#L19) This is likely intentional, but it is behaviorally breaking for environments that relied on fixed assistant labeling. If unintended, this will alter backup metadata and downstream filtering. 2. `Medium` Source override compatibility in fallback path is still normalized by compliance allowlist. [`scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L67`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L67) `source_name` can be overridden by callers, but `orchestration_compliance` falls back to `kernel-run-complete` for non-allowlisted sources. If you expect custom source taxonomy to survive fallback, this is a mismatch. 3. `Low` Shell quoting/arg construction is now safe for spaces and optional args, and empty-flag handling is guarded. [`scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L120`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L120), [`scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L137`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L137), [`scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh#L150`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh#L150), [`scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh#L229`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh#L229) No quoting regression found in current diff. 4. `Low` Fallback wrapper now carries Project OS fields (good), but fallback-specific assertions for those fields are missing. [`scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L90`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L90), [`tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh) **Verification run** - Passed: `bash tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` - Passed: `bash tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh` - Passed: `bash tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh` - Passed: `bash tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh` **Required/Recommended tests before merge** - Add fallback test asserting `project_os_ticket_id`, `project_os_acceptance_text`, `project_os_authority_scope` are persisted in journal payload. - Add one explicit test for provider-derived default assistant (`FUGUE_EXECUTION_PROVIDER`/`KERNEL_EXECUTION_PROVIDER`) to lock intended default behavior. - Add one fallback test clarifying expected `orchestration_compliance` when custom source is used. **Sign-off recommendation** Approve with conditions. No blocking shell-quoting issue remains in current state, but merge should wait for the 3 test additions above to lock compatibility semantics and prevent silent behavior drift. 作業レポート: 目的達成度 100%、到達まで残り 0 slices。
